summary: Iteration 3 (burger menu + Ελλείψεις + Πρόγραμμα υπαλλήλων) fully verified. Backend: 15/15 pytest tests pass including 5 new tests for availability PATCH, shopping CRUD+tenancy, employees CRUD+cascade, shifts upsert/tenancy/cross-tenant guard, and auth guards. Frontend: end-to-end Playwright covers login, burger drawer (all 5 links + logout + backdrop close), Stock page toggle + note + shopping list add/check/delete, PDA reflects unavailable items (data-available=false + 'Έλλειψη' badge), Schedule week nav + add employee + upsert shift + delete shift + cascade delete employee, Analytics/MenuManagement carry the burger, logout, and unauth redirect for /stock and /schedule.

issues: Radix DialogContent missing aria-describedby (a11y warning in console). Non-blocking.

action_items: Optional: add DialogDescription (or aria-describedby={undefined} suppression) to ShiftModal DialogContent to silence a11y warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py at 672 lines is approaching the 700-line soft limit; consider splitting routers (auth/menu/orders/shopping/employees/shifts) into modules.
DELETE /api/shifts currently returns 200 with deleted:0 even when nothing matches; consider 404 for idempotency clarity — however current behaviour is safe and used by the UI, so low priority.
PATCH availability accepts empty note but no length cap — consider max_length parity with MenuItemIn.unavailable_note.
Frontend Stock.setNote does an availability PATCH on every note blur even when item is available (available:true, note:''); harmless but wasteful.
seed_data_creation: Tests create ephemeral users (test_<uuid>@example.com), TEST_-prefixed employees/shopping items/shifts. No cleanup fixture — data lives in Mongo but is uniquely prefixed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 3 backend endpoints all healthy: PATCH /api/menu/items/{id}/availability, /api/shopping CRUD, /api/employees CRUD (cascades shifts), /api/shifts PUT/GET/DELETE (unique-index upsert, cross-tenant returns 404). Frontend: burger drawer testids drawer-link-{pda|analytics|menu|stock|schedule}, drawer-close-btn, drawer-backdrop, drawer-logout-btn. Stock: stock-row-{id}, toggle-{id}, note-{id}, shopping-input/add-btn/item-{id}/check-{id}/delete-{id}, unavailable-count. Schedule: burger-btn, week-range, prev/next/today-week-btn, new-employee-input, add-employee-btn, emp-row-{id}, emp-name-{id}, cell-{empId}-{dayIdx}, shift-modal/start/end/save/delete-btn, del-emp-{id}. Employee delete uses window.confirm — Playwright must accept dialog. PDA items render data-available='false' when unavailable and show 'Έλλειψη' badge.
